_comment: Defines every tool Forge has. trust_level is the minimum level required to use it.

analyze_command_output.description: Receive and store terminal output pasted by Nic for analysis. Never executes anything.

apply_patch.description: Apply an approved patch to a file. Requires explicit Nic approval.

code_related_files.description: List related indexed files for one engine family. Read-only; does not touch project files.

code_relationship_export.description: Export relationship intelligence reports as Forge-owned JSON/Markdown manifests. Does not modify engine files.

code_relationship_map.description: Build a read-only relationship map for one engine family, connecting indexed files, symbols, tests, runtime roles, variants, and readiness status.

code_relationship_policy.description: Show Patch 79 read-only code relationship intelligence policy. No engine file writes, no authority.

code_risk_neighbors.description: Show read-only risk neighbors for one engine family, including variants, test/validation neighbors, and patch history hints.

engine_approved_lockfile_candidate.description: Create a Forge-owned non-authoritative lockfile candidate from approved eligible review ledger rows only. Does not touch engine files.

engine_approved_lockfile_export.description: Export the human-approved lockfile candidate as JSON and Markdown under Forge-owned manifests. Does not touch engine files.

engine_approved_lockfile_policy.description: Show Patch 74 human-approved lockfile candidate policy. Read-only.

engine_approved_lockfile_show.description: Show one exact engine_base row from the approved lockfile candidate or exclusions. Read-only.

engine_approved_lockfile_validate.description: Validate approved-candidate invariants: approved eligible rows only, no holds, no pending/deferred/rejected rows, no authority. Read-only.

engine_brief.description: Generate a plain-English read-only brief for one engine family.

engine_brief_core.description: Show plain-English read-only briefs for core runtime engine families.

engine_brief_export.description: Export engine briefs as Forge-owned JSON/Markdown reports. Does not modify engine files.

engine_brief_holds.description: Show plain-English read-only briefs for held/deferred engine families.

engine_brief_policy.description: Show Patch 77 read-only engine brief policy.

engine_canonical_export.description: Export the canonical engine review as JSON and Markdown under Forge-owned manifests. Does not touch engine files.

engine_canonical_policy.description: Show the Patch 68 canonical engine review policy. Read-only.

engine_canonical_review.description: Create a Forge-owned review-only canonical engine candidate report. Does not move/delete/quarantine/lock engine files.

engine_canonical_show.description: Show one canonical engine family and its variants from the review layer. Read-only.

engine_decision_core.description: Show decision rows for core runtime engine bases that require symbolic-runtime review before lockfile. Read-only.

engine_decision_draft.description: Create a Forge-owned review-only draft of keep/hold decisions for canonical engine candidates. Does not lock/move/delete/quarantine engine files.

engine_decision_exact.description: Show exactly one engine_base decision row without fuzzy variant-path matches. Read-only.

engine_decision_export.description: Export the canonical engine decision draft as JSON and Markdown under Forge-owned manifests. Does not touch engine files.

engine_decision_holds.description: Show only canonical engine decision rows that are on manual hold. Read-only.

engine_decision_list.description: List Patch 69 decision draft rows by HOLD, DRAFT, ALL, or exact decision type. Read-only.

engine_decision_policy.description: Show the Patch 69 canonical engine decision-draft policy. Read-only.

engine_decision_show.description: Show one canonical engine decision draft row and its required human checks. Read-only.

engine_decision_summary.description: Show Patch 70 read-only summary of decision counts, holds, confidence, and high-variant families.

engine_lockfile_draft.description: Create a Forge-owned draft canonical engine lockfile from DRAFT decisions only. Excludes HOLD families. Does not move/delete/quarantine/lock engine files.

engine_lockfile_export.description: Export draft canonical engine lockfile JSON and Markdown under Forge-owned manifests. Does not touch engine files.

engine_lockfile_policy.description: Show Patch 71 draft canonical engine lockfile policy. Read-only.

engine_lockfile_show.description: Show one exact engine_base row from the draft lockfile payload, including held/excluded status. Read-only.

engine_lockfile_validate.description: Validate draft lockfile invariants: no HOLD rows included, no destructive claims, no duplicate included bases. Read-only.

engine_readiness_export.description: Export approved candidate readiness report as JSON and Markdown under Forge-owned manifests. Does not touch engine files.

engine_readiness_policy.description: Show Patch 78 approved candidate readiness report policy. Read-only.

engine_readiness_report.description: Summarize human-approved candidate readiness before final authority. Read-only.

engine_readiness_risks.description: Summarize remaining blockers before any final engine authority. Read-only.

engine_readiness_show.description: Show one approved candidate readiness row. Read-only.

engine_review_batch_approve_core.description: Batch-approve non-held core runtime candidates in the review ledger only. Does not create canonical authority or touch engine files.

engine_review_batch_defer_holds.description: Batch-defer all held engine families in the review ledger only. Held families remain excluded.

engine_review_batch_export.description: Export Patch 73 batch review ledger/status as JSON and Markdown. Does not touch engine files.

engine_review_batch_plan.description: Create a Forge-owned batch review plan for core approvals and held-family deferrals. Does not touch engine files.

engine_review_batch_policy.description: Show Patch 73 engine review batch policy. Read-only.

engine_review_batch_status.description: Summarize Patch 73 batch review progress for core rows and held families. Read-only.

engine_review_export.description: Export the engine review ledger as JSON and Markdown under Forge-owned manifests. Does not touch engine files.

engine_review_ledger_init.description: Initialize a Forge-owned human review ledger from the draft canonical engine lockfile. Does not touch engine files.

engine_review_ledger_policy.description: Show Patch 72 human review ledger policy. Read-only.

engine_review_mark.description: Record human review status for one engine family in the Forge-owned review ledger. Does not grant canonical authority or touch engine files.

engine_review_show.description: Show one exact engine review ledger row. Read-only.

engine_review_status.description: Summarize the engine review ledger approval/deferred/rejected/pending state. Read-only.

list_allowed_folders.description: List the currently approved and session-scoped folders Forge can access.

list_files.description: List files inside an approved directory up to a given depth.

llm_memory_correction.description: Write a safe correction receipt so future LLM-facing work can reference prior mistakes and fixes. No project writes.

llm_memory_export.description: Export LLM memory ledger summary as JSON and Markdown under Forge-owned memory only.

llm_memory_init.description: Initialize Forge-owned LLM memory ledger folders and policy receipts. Does not touch project files.

llm_memory_log_turn.description: Write a safe LLM turn receipt containing summaries, recommendations, outcomes, and next command context. No hidden chain-of-thought.

llm_memory_policy.description: Show Patch 75 LLM memory ledger policy. Read-only; no hidden chain-of-thought storage.

llm_memory_search.description: Search Forge-owned LLM memory receipts by plain text. Read-only.

llm_memory_session.description: Summarize LLM memory ledger/session state. Read-only.

llm_memory_show.description: Show latest or selected LLM memory receipt. Read-only.

llm_tool_check.description: Check whether a requested Forge tool is allowed through the LLM gateway. Read-only.

llm_tool_init.description: Initialize Forge-owned LLM tool gateway policy/index receipts. Does not touch project files.

llm_tool_mode.description: Show current LLM tool gateway mode and authority limits. Read-only.

llm_tool_policy.description: Show Patch 76 LLM tool gateway policy. Read-only; no tool execution.

llm_tool_report.description: Show latest or selected LLM tool request receipt. Read-only.

llm_tool_request.description: Write an audited LLM tool request receipt under Forge-owned llm_memory_v1/tool_requests. Does not execute tools.

patch_apply_gate_matrix.description: Read-only full matrix showing whether an apply plan passes disk, sandbox, test, and relevance gates.

patch_apply_gate_show.description: Detailed read-only full apply gate matrix for one apply plan.

patch_apply_gate_status.description: Read-only summary of recent apply plans and which gate blocks them.

patch_sandbox_apply.description: Apply a patch plan to a Forge-owned sandbox copy only. Never modifies project files.

patch_sandbox_clean.description: Delete a Forge-owned sandbox copy after explicit CLEAN confirmation. Reports are preserved.

patch_sandbox_gate_check.description: Read-only check that an apply plan has a matching SANDBOX_APPLIED report before real patch-apply.

patch_sandbox_gate_status.description: Read-only summary of sandbox reports that can satisfy the Patch 62 apply gate.

patch_sandbox_plan.description: Create a Forge-owned sandbox rehearsal plan from an approved apply plan. Does not modify project files.

patch_sandbox_report.description: Show the current sandbox plan/report state.

patch_sandbox_smoke_apply.description: Apply the Patch 61 smoke plan through sandbox mode only. Writes only under Forge-owned sandbox folders.

patch_sandbox_smoke_clean.description: Delete the Forge-owned smoke sandbox copy after explicit CLEAN confirmation. Reports are preserved.

patch_sandbox_smoke_plan.description: Create a Forge-owned smoke target plus matching apply/sandbox plan to prove the sandbox success path. Never modifies AI.Web project files.

patch_sandbox_smoke_report.description: Show the Patch 61 smoke sandbox plan/report state.

patch_test_bind.description: Bind one apply plan to one successful Patch 64 safe test report. Writes only Forge-owned patch_test_bindings JSON.

patch_test_binding_report.description: Read one Forge-owned patch/test binding receipt.

patch_test_gate_check.description: Read-only check that an apply plan has a matching TEST_BOUND safe test receipt before real patch-apply.

patch_test_gate_status.description: Read-only summary of safe test bindings eligible for the Patch 65 apply gate.

patch_test_relevance_check.description: Read-only check that a patch/test binding uses a relevant safe test, not an unrelated PASS report.

patch_test_relevance_policy.description: Show Patch 66 rules for relevant safe test binding. Read-only.

patch_test_relevance_status.description: Summarize TEST_BOUND receipts by relevance status.

propose_command.description: Propose a safe diagnostic shell command for Nic to run manually. Forge never executes it.

read_file.description: Read the contents of a file inside an approved path.

run_safe_command.description: Execute a command from the Level 1.0 hard-coded allowlist. No shell. No user input in argv.

run_tests.description: Run the project test suite and return output.

search_knowledge_base.description: Search the local ChromaDB knowledge base. Only available after indexing.

search_text.description: Search for a text string across files in an approved path.

show_diff.description: Show the diff between current file and a proposed change.

snapshot_create_policy.description: Show Patch 81 snapshot manifest dry-run policy. Read-only; no snapshot creation or restore authority.

snapshot_diff_plan.description: Compare latest snapshot plan metadata only. No file diff and no restore authority.

snapshot_export.description: Export snapshot plan index as Forge-owned JSON/Markdown. Does not copy project files.

snapshot_manifest_dry_run.description: Write a Forge-owned dry-run hash manifest receipt for future snapshots. Does not copy project files or grant restore authority.

snapshot_manifest_export.description: Export the snapshot manifest dry-run index as JSON and Markdown under Forge-owned memory. Does not copy project files.

snapshot_manifest_show.description: Show a snapshot manifest dry-run receipt. Read-only.

snapshot_manifest_validate.description: Validate dry-run snapshot manifest invariants: no copy, no restore, hashes present. Read-only.

snapshot_plan.description: Write a Forge-owned forensic snapshot plan receipt. Does not copy project files and does not restore anything.

snapshot_policy.description: Show Patch 80 snapshot planning policy. Plan/export only; no snapshot creation or restore authority.

snapshot_readiness_blockers.description: Show blockers/warnings from a snapshot readiness receipt. Read-only.

snapshot_readiness_check.description: Verify latest dry-run snapshot manifest and write Forge-owned readiness receipt. No snapshot creation or restore.

snapshot_readiness_export.description: Export snapshot readiness receipt index as JSON and Markdown under Forge-owned memory. No snapshot creation or restore.

snapshot_readiness_policy.description: Show Patch 82 snapshot manifest verify / snapshot-create readiness gate policy. Read-only.

snapshot_readiness_show.description: Show a snapshot readiness receipt. Read-only.

snapshot_show.description: Show one snapshot plan receipt. Read-only.

test_inventory.description: Read-only inventory of indexed test files, configs, logs, and engine test coverage. Does not execute tests.

test_policy.description: Show the safe-test policy and future execution allowlist rules. Does not execute tests.

test_readiness.description: Read-only readiness summary for future safe test runner integration.

test_run_history.description: List recent safe test run reports.

test_run_policy.description: Show Patch 64 allowlisted safe test runner policy. Does not execute tests.

test_run_report.description: Read one safe test run report from Forge-owned memory/test_run_reports.

test_run_safe.description: Run one explicit allowlisted Python test target using subprocess argv with shell=False. Writes only test run reports.

test_run_smoke.description: Create a Forge-owned smoke Python file and compile it through the Patch 64 safe runner.

test_show.description: Read-only display of test inventory rows by path, framework, or engine.

write_proposed_patch.description: Write a patch proposal to ~/forge/proposed_patches/. NEVER modifies project files. Nic applies manually.

snapshot_create.description: Create a Forge-owned snapshot archive from the latest validated manifest/readiness receipts. No restore or project-write authority.

snapshot_create_show.description: Show a snapshot create receipt. Read-only.

snapshot_create_verify.description: Verify a snapshot create receipt and copied files. Read-only verification; no restore authority.

snapshot_create_export.description: Export snapshot create receipt index as Forge-owned JSON/Markdown. No restore authority.
